# Beyond the Cosmic Veil
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world God's invisible qualities—his eternal power and divine nature—have been clearly seen, being understood from what has been made, so that people are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we catch glimpses of God's majesty and power. The stars, planets, and galaxies all declare His glory, yet they only scratch the surface of His infinite nature. Just as the cosmic veil of deep space hides unseen wonders, our limited understanding can only partially grasp the depths of God's character. And yet, in His mercy, He has revealed Himself to us through creation and through His Word. As we ponder the mysteries of the universe, we are reminded that there is more to God than what we can see or comprehend.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of Your creation, help us to look beyond the cosmic veil and catch glimpses of Your eternal power and divine nature. May our limited understanding not hinder our worship, but rather may it inspire us to seek You more deeply. Reveal Yourself to us in new and wondrous ways, that we may declare Your glory to a world in need of Your light. Amen.
